name: agy-gemini-local
description: Local marketplace for the agy-gemini plugin (Gemini/Antigravity agy CLI as an MCP tool, plus a delegation skill).

plugins.name: agy-gemini
plugins.description: Spawn a Gemini agent (Antigravity `agy` CLI) as an MCP tool, plus a skill teaching Claude when and how to delegate tasks to it.
